clusters.justification: These terms share convergent co-activation within the salience and limbic networks, mediating the physiological arousal, regulation, and subjective experience of valenced internal states.
This grouping reflects the mesolimbic-cortical computational axis responsible for assessing subjective utility, processing reinforcement, and driving goal-oriented decision-making.
Anchored primarily in the default mode network, these domains depend on the internally directed generation of abstracted representational models of the self and other agents.
